description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a tan-colored body and a prominent cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel. The weapon is equipped with a large drum magazine beneath the receiver, suggesting high ammunition capacity. A black metal rail system runs along the top, likely for mounting optics or accessories, and the rifle includes a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The overall construction appears robust, with a mix of metal and polymer materials, and the tan finish is suitable for urban or desert environments. The trigger, magazine release, and charging handle are all visible, indicating multiple interactive components. The rifle's design is modern, with a focus on modularity and tactical use.
description: A modern tan tactical rifle with a large suppressor, drum magazine, and top rail system, designed for high capacity and modular use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical suppressor and the round drum magazine directly beneath the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tan receiver, large drum magazine, pistol grip, and the full length of the suppressor.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver, the drum magazine, and the alignment of the top rail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with additional detail on the magazine and grip.
